arts.ttl: Manchester United 25-man training squad vs Viktoria Plzen revealed with double injury boost
arts.sum: Man Utd face Viktoria Plzen in the Europa League on Thursday as Ruben Amorim looks to end a run of two successive defeats.

arts.ttl: Player reveals he’s aware of Manchester United’s interest – Vice-president confirms transfer approach
arts.sum: Manchester United are showing interest in Cerro Porteño’s Diego León. Earlier today, we covered multiple claims from South America which stated the Red Devils are in talks with the Paraguayan side for the left-back. It was also reported Cerro Porteñ vice-president Juan Carlos Pettengill neither confirmed nor denied Manchester United’s approach. arts.ttl: "Honestly" - Jadon Sancho Manchester United recall prospects as Chelsea impressed with loan star
arts.sum: Jadon Sancho is on loan at Premier League rivals Chelsea and seemingly now delivering results

arts.ttl: Latest transfer news: Marcus Rashford to leave Manchester United?
arts.sum: The transfer market remains closed until January but clubs are still extremely busy behind the scenes as they plan for future arrivals. There's now less than one month until the winter window opens...

arts.ttl: Sir Jim Ratcliffe told to give Man Utd fans 'clarity' over shock Dan Ashworth exit
arts.sum: Former Premier League striker Chris Sutton has criticised Manchester United co-owner Sir Jim Ratcliffe's decision-making after Dan Ashworth lasted just five months as sporting director

arts.ttl: Man Utd fixture change sparks fan criticism against Premier League broadcasters
arts.sum: The change in kick-off time for a Man Utd fixture in January has sparked criticism against the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Ashworth emerges as Arsenal sporting director target after Man Utd exit
arts.sum: Dan Ashworth has emerged as a potential target for Arsenal's vacant sporting director role.

arts.ttl: Man Utd transfer news: Red Devils 'monitoring' Bayern Munich midfielder
arts.sum: Manchester United are 'monitoring' Bayern Munich midfielder Konrad Laimer, according to reports in Germany.. Elsewhere, reports in Italy suggest Napoli are close to signing Joshua Zirkzee, with head coach Antonio Conte said to be hopeful of repeating the trick he managed in the summer when he raided Man Utd for Scott McTominay, who has gone on to thrive in Serie A.

arts.ttl: “Active talks” – Man Utd discussing transfer deal with player’s agents in bid to fix problem position
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly in talks with the agents of talented young left-back Diego Leon as they look to strengthen for the future. The Red Devils have issues at left-back at the moment after so many injury problems for both Luke Shaw and Tyrell Malacia, so it makes sense that that position is a priority […] The post “Active talks” – Man Utd discussing transfer deal with player’s agents in bid to fix problem position appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Man United enter talks to sign 17-year-old South American wonderkid - as the club search for a long-term successor to Luke Shaw on the left flank
arts.sum: SIMON JONES: The 17-year old has broken into Cerro Porteno's first team in Paraguay's Primera Division, making 21 appearances and scoring two goals.
